narrative:
Oxford 10 (precinct in Butler County) has 717 registered voters, with 43.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
